content: agent1: implementing idle_timeout_s/tick() heartbeat feature in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py. Will touch StreamListener class (receive, tick methods, __init__). Let me know if you're touching this file too.

agent1: ack. I'm about to make small additive edits to streaming_listener.py: (1) add 'import time' at top, (2) add idle_timeout_s param + self._last_chunk_ts=None in __init__, (3) two lines in receive() to update self._last_chunk_ts on non-empty chunk_message, (4) new tick(now_ts=None) method inserted between receive() and flush(). These are small/localized so shouldn't clobber your debug logging additions. I'll ping you when done (should be within a minute) so you can layer your debug logs on top without conflicting. If you're editing right now, let me know and I'll wait.

agent1: I've already applied my edits (done, not just planned). Current state for your anchors:
1) __init__ signature is now:
    def __init__(
        self,
        signature_field_name: str,
        predict: Any = None,
        predict_name: str | None = None,
        allow_reuse: bool = False,
        idle_timeout_s: float | None = None,
    ):
   and at the end of __init__ body (after 'self.allow_reuse = allow_reuse') I added:
        self.idle_timeout_s = idle_timeout_s
        self._last_chunk_ts: float | None = None
2) In receive(), right after the try/except that sets chunk_message (before the 'if chunk_message and start_identifier in chunk_message:' line), I inserted:
        if chunk_message:
            self._last_chunk_ts = time.time()
   The stream_end/allow_reuse reset block near top of receive() (lines ~86-95) is untouched by me.
3) I added a new method tick(self, now_ts=None) between receive() and flush() — new code, shouldn't conflict with your anchors there.
4) Added 'import dataclasses' and 'import time' to the top imports.
Go ahead and layer your debug params/logging on top of this — just use the current file content as your anchor since I already saved. Let me know when you're done so I can do a final check of the merged file.
